note: AI-interpreted from pdfplumber raw text. Dole (20 deliveries) + JR Holland produce tickets (6). Transition to winter season: satsuma arrives in bulk (£12–20/10x1kg box, rising through month), plum Angelino Spain/Italy late, exotic grapes peak (Alison SA/Italy, Autumn Crisp SA, Candy Spain, Autumn Royal, Sugarone, Adora, Ivory SA). Date Medjool Israel appears 14/11 (£28/5kg). Passion Fruit Kenya 25/11. Mango Brazil ramping up, cheap large boxes (£6/7-unit, £4/6-unit). Blueberry UK/Spain both premium £18/1.5kg. Very limited Dole veg — mushrooms and carrots only. Holland veg: cucumbers, red peppers, celery, courgettes, butternut squash, mushroom, Chinese leaf.
